arts.ttl: Manuel Neuer: “Generally, [Bayern is] never satisfied with a point against Borussia Dortmund”
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s record against Borussia Dortmund has generally been a very positive one over the years, with Die Schwarzgelben being subjected to some humbling scorelines over the years. Leverkusen are another rival, after all, against which the Bavarians would wish to have a better record against, considering they are now four games without a win against Die Werkself .

arts.ttl: Gittens on target as Dortmund draw with Bayern
arts.sum: Watch highlights as Bayern Munich come from behind to draw 1-1 with Borussia Dortmund in the Bundesliga thanks to a late header from Jamal Musiala after Jamie Gittens scored to put the hosts in front.England's Jamie Gittens scored to put the hosts in front.

arts.ttl: Player ratings: Borussia Dortmund 1 - 1 Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich drew 1-1 in the first Der Klassiker of the season against Borussia Dortmund on the road at Signal Iduna Park. Player Ratings Vote ( view results )

arts.ttl: “We have one point and that’s good” — Upamecano chooses to see the positives in Bayern Munich’s draw against BVB
arts.sum: Dayot Upamecano : “We had to score a goal and reacted very well in the second half,” Upamecano appraised, via Bayern’s official website . In the end, we have one point and that’s good.”

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Bayer Leverkusen - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's DFB-Pokal clash between Bayern Munich and Bayer Leverkusen, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Marmoush scores two and Eintracht Frankfurt wins 4-0 at Heidenheim to close gap on Bayern
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush continued his prolific form with two more goals as second-place Eintracht Frankfurt won 4-0 at Heidenheim on Sunday to move four points behind Bundesliga leader Bayern Munich. In Sunday’s other game, striker Jonathan Burkardt scored first-half goals as Mainz beat Hoffenheim 2-0 to move into seventh place.
